_meta.purpose: Pinned-reference SHA-256 hashes for calibration-ledger.json blocks (spec section 6.1 forward-only invariant). Each block hash is content-addressable via json.dumps(block, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":")). retrospective_attribution_audit_gate refuses any release where a current block hash differs from its pinned reference; new blocks are tolerated until pinned.
